company_context: Universal Data Platform | Census Sign In Census is now Fivetran Activations Visit Fivetran to learn more about Activations and start a free trial. Existing customers can continue to log in at app.getcensus.com through April 1. For questions, contact Fivetran Support . Unify. Enhance. Activate. Your data is yours. Use it. Everywhere. Request a demo

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours unify and activate their data. I came across your company, Fivetran, and noticed you're in the data integration space. I'd love to explore how our solution can complement your existing infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We've been focusing on our own data integration platform, and I'm not sure we're looking to add another vendor to the mix. What makes DeepData AI unique, and how does it differ from what we're already doing?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our AI-powered engine allows for faster and more accurate data processing, which can lead to significant cost savings and improved decision-making. We've seen our customers achieve up to 30% reduction in data processing time. I'd be happy to set up a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I'm concerned about integration. We've invested heavily in our own platform, and I don't want to introduce any compatibility issues. How would DeepData AI integrate with our existing systems, and what kind of support would you provide?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: We've designed our solution to be highly adaptable, and our team would work closely with yours to ensure a seamless integration. We've had success with similar implementations in the past, and I can provide case studies and references if you'd like. Additionally, our support team is available 24/7 to address any concerns.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Okay, I'm intrigued, but I have to consider the timing. We're in the middle of our budget cycle, and I'm not sure we have the funds allocated for a new solution like this. Can you tell me more about the pricing, and are there any discounts available for a company of our size?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is tiered based on data volume, and we offer discounts for larger enterprises. For a company like Fivetran, I'd estimate the annual cost to be around $200,000. However, I can discuss potential discounts and customized plans with our sales team.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your transparency, Alex, but $200,000 is out of our budget for this year. We've already allocated our resources to other priorities, and I don't see us being able to justify that expense. I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for now. Thank you for reaching out, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more flexible with pricing and explored potential discounts or customized plans earlier in the conversation to address the buyer's budget concerns. Sentiment: Neutral
